case_title: FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE VS. SUN KAU SHING COMPANY, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-22-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE AUG-08-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-22-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE AS TO DEFENDANT SUN KAU SHING COMPANY, INC. DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-08-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-06-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-24-2008
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE SERVED MAR-27-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SUN KAU SHING COMPANY, INC.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
